subject_information.address: 49331 Lewis Views Apt. 516, Lake Maryshire, DE 59549

suspicious_activity.narrative: Jacqueline Rodriguez, DOB 2001-02-01, residing at 49331 Lewis Views Apt. 516, Lake Maryshire, DE, engaged in suspicious activity from 2025-02-05 to 2025-08-01. High volume of large wire transfers totaling $76,517.25 on 2025-07-29 and multiple debits totaling $49,517.51 on 2025-07-30 and 2025-07-31 were noted. Funds moved rapidly across accounts CUST_0111_ACC_1 and CUST_0111_ACC_2, inconsistent with her profile as a conservation officer. Activity suggests potential money laundering through layering. Accounts involved: CUST_0111_ACC_1, CUST_0111_ACC_2. Filed under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11.
key_indicators: High volume of large wire transfers
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: High volume of large wire transfers, rapid movement of funds, and high-risk rating suggest potential layering of illicit funds.
